commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5b2677ea9a1a871473acb2aa0bdd10de0950a3de)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional `available` metadata to `models.list`, threads it through generated Swift and Android model summaries, and updates Android provider readiness UI/tests to distinguish usable, expiring, setup-required, and catalog-only providers.

PR surface: Source +247, Tests +354, Other +241. Total +842 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main computes Home provider readiness from `models.authStatus` status only and emits `No ready providers` when that count is zero, while Android separately loads usable model rows from `models.list`. I did not run a before-state emulator, but the current source and after-fix screenshots make the mismatch clear.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human maintainer review is needed for the shared `models.list` availability contract; the remaining command-palette issue is mechanical but not the only merge consideration.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
